name: Chicken and Bean Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 2 large chicken breasts, cooked and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked chicken, 1 3/8 cups of picante sauce, and baked beans in a bowl.
2. Evenly spoon the mixture into the center of each tortilla.
3. Roll up each tortilla tightly, placing the seam side down in a 3-quart shallow baking dish.
4. Pour any remaining picante sauce over the enchiladas.
5. Cover with aluminum foil and bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
6. Remove the foil and sprinkle shredded cheese on top of the enchiladas.
7. Continue baking uncovered for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
8. Serves 4.
